finding: The assistant could not find `ATM Bug and Optimization Backlog` when asked to update the bug record, because the backlog was not exposed through a dedicated skill or canonical repo path.
expectedBehavior: AI routing should trigger a skill that points directly to the correct backlog.
evidenceOrRepro: Initial searches found `docs/INCIDENT_RESPONSE.md` and `docs/governance/redteam-drift-defects.md`, but not this backlog.
followUp: Keep `.agents/skills/atm-bug-backlog/SKILL.md` as the canonical trigger surface for bug/optimization recording.
